notes: Added Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+V keyboard shortcut to toggle session visualization panel. Keyboard listener registered in SessionVizProvider provider (which wraps session side panel). Toggles showSessionViz in settings. Auto-switches to viz tab via createEffect in SessionSidePanel. Viz tab trigger shows ⌘⇧V shortcut hint. Guard prevents interception when user is typing in input/textarea/contenteditable.
